posts.author: PiratePatriotParrot
posts.title: Payback

posts.raw_content: Thomas Massie has been promising for nearly a year to read the Epstein-linked names on the House floor — and we’re still waiting. Either he doesn’t actually have the information he claims, or he’s unwilling to follow through. It’s all political theater meant to waste time. Either do it or shut the fuck up — the people voted you out for a reason; you’re as fake as they come. A "RINO" is a Republican-in-name-only: a politician who publicly identifies as Republican but acts like a Democrat or betrays conservative principles, prioritizing party elites or personal ambition over conservative voters.
